intentionally_unrouted.reason: Primary DSN/SES exercise; Top-to-Bottom endpoints should require a multilayer transition.

partially_unrouted_branches.reason: Preserved as an additional Top-to-Bottom autorouter branch.
Most endpoints are intentionally reserved for the later GND copper pour and/or Freerouting.

connectivity_review.expected_error: Net 'SENSE' has 2 endpoints and no traces.

ratline_note: The 21 source ratlines are preserved from the last revision confirmed to open in DipTrace. Reciprocal Component/Pad NetId attributes were added so DipTrace can reconcile them against Net/Pads without reconstructing one-sided connectivity.
